## Livestock ownership

```{r}
#| label: livestock ownership table

livestock_ownership_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "livestock_ownership_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

tbls50x30:: livestock_ownership(
  hhold_df = livestock_ownership_df,
  animal_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$livestock_ownership_animal_var),
  cases = cases_for_report,
  group_var = "supervisor"
)
```
